# kapiko

> kapiko is an AI music intelligence platform analyzing 118 genres and 10,948 songs — audio features, production patterns, and AI music generation prompts for musicians, producers, and developers.

kapiko builds statistical profiles of music genres from Spotify audio feature data, enriched with Gemini AI analysis. Each genre report covers 100 representative tracks and surfaces patterns in tempo, key, energy, mood, instrumentation, and production style.

## Available Genre Analytics (118 genres)

Full analysis reports available at `/genres/<genre>/`:

- [Acoustic](/genres/acoustic/)
- [Afrobeat](/genres/afrobeat/)
- [Alt Rock](/genres/alt-rock/)
- [Alternative](/genres/alternative/)
- [Ambient](/genres/ambient/)
- [Anime](/genres/anime/)
- [Black Metal](/genres/black-metal/)
- [Bluegrass](/genres/bluegrass/)
- [Blues](/genres/blues/)

- [World Music](/genres/world-music/)

## Static Data Files

Each of the 118 genres has a machine-readable analysis file:

- `/genres/<genre>/analysis.json` — Full Spotify audio feature analysis (100 tracks per genre)

Analysis JSON schema includes: `bpm` (histogram, median, mean, stdev, raw), `key_distribution`, `mode_distribution`, `key_mode_distribution`, `energy`, `valence`, `acousticness`, `instrumentalness`, `danceability`, `loudness`, `speechiness`, `duration`, `top_artists`, `tracks`.

## Song Pages (10,948 songs)

Each song at `/songs/<slug>/` includes:
- Audio feature breakdown (BPM, key, energy, valence, etc.)
- AI music generation prompts (Suno, Udio, Agent JSON)
- Spotify audio feature radar chart
- Artist and album metadata

## API

Base URL: `https://kapiko.ai/api/v1`

The kapiko REST API provides programmatic access to genre analytics and track data. Open access, no authentication required.

### Endpoints

- `GET /api/v1/stats` — Platform statistics (118 genres, 10,948 tracks)
- `GET /api/v1/genres` — List all available genres with summary stats
- `GET /api/v1/genres/:genre` — Full analytics for a specific genre
- `GET /api/v1/genres/:genre/tracks` — Track list for a genre with audio features
- `GET /api/v1/tracks` — Browse all indexed tracks
- `GET /api/v1/tracks/:id` — Single track with full audio features and AI analysis

Full API documentation: https://kapiko.ai/api/
OpenAPI spec: https://kapiko.ai/openapi.json
Agent discovery: https://kapiko.ai/.well-known/agents.json
Machine-readable data index: https://kapiko.ai/data/api-summary.json

## AI Analysis Fields (Gemini)

Tracks and genre aggregates include Gemini-generated analysis: `instruments`, `primary_instrument`, `mood_primary`, `mood_secondary`, `texture`, `atmosphere`, `dynamics`, `vocal_presence`, `stereo_width`, `harmonic_complexity`, `rhythm_presence`, `genre_tags`, `sound_design_elements`, `similar_artists`.

## Attribution & Contact

Data sourced from the Spotify Tracks Dataset (pre-deprecation audio features). AI analysis powered by Google Gemini.

- Website: https://kapiko.ai
- API docs: https://kapiko.ai/api/
- Data: https://kapiko.ai/data/

Content is provided for research, development, and educational use.
